items.prompt: Should a student be allowed to skip a required group project if their choice makes the class’s overall result worse?

ChatGPT.reasoning: No, a student should not be allowed to skip a required group project if their absence negatively impacts the class’s overall result, as group projects rely on collective effort and fairness to all participants.
